decision.summary: No new action: all open positions are now discarded_for_slot, but with only 2 hours left in the daily session and no clean weekly edge, there is still nothing worth reopening.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 77536.49, sitting near the session low with shorts still dominant, but the account no longer has any active price-hit positions: the daily 77k dip, the daily 79k reach, the weekly 80k reach, and the old weekly 72k dip are all now discarded_for_slot. That means slot capacity is technically free, but the board still does not offer a valid fresh edge. On the daily side, only 2 hours remain until expiry and the nearest strikes are all weak: 77k dip is only around 18%, 79k reach around 2.85%, and everything else is even lower, so there is no credible same-day setup left. On the weekly side, the nearest upside strike, 80k reach, has fallen to about 16.5%, while the nearest downside strike, 72k dip, is only about 1.4%; neither is close to the preferred range, and reopening a discarded thesis just because the slot is free would violate the spirit of the playbook. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone because there are no active positions left. The correct action is to stay flat operationally and wait for the next clean slate instead of forcing a late-session or weak weekly re-entry.
